title: epidendrum althausenii
intro: Epidendrum althausenii, also known as the Althaus' Epidendrum, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum althausenii include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antifungal and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
